description_long: This is a sleek, modern sailing yacht with a single tall mast and a streamlined monohull design. The hull is predominantly black with a wooden deck, featuring metal railings along the perimeter for safety. The deck includes a central cockpit area with seating and a blue sunshade, as well as visible hatches and deck fittings. The yacht is equipped with rigging and sails, with the main sail furled and a blue jib partially deployed. Windows are present along the sides of the hull, suggesting an interior cabin space. The overall appearance is that of a well-maintained, mid-sized recreational yacht suitable for leisure cruising.
description: A modern sailing yacht with a black hull, wooden deck, tall mast, and blue sunshade, featuring a central cockpit and visible rigging.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed bow, central mast, and the symmetry of the deck layout.
description_view_1: Starboard side view highlighting the black hull, wooden deck, blue sunshade, and side windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open cockpit area, railings, and the stern's shape.
description_view_3: Port side view similar to the starboard, showing the hull, deck, and rigging details.
attribute_hull_design: Monohull with a pointed bow and rounded stern, deep-V profile, black hull with minimal markings, and visible side windows.
attribute_deck_layout: Single-level deck with a central cockpit, blue sunshade, metal railings along the perimeter, hatches, and seating area aft of the mast.
attribute_cabin_structure: One main cabin structure located centrally with side windows, low-profile exterior, and no visible doors or additional cabins.
